results.title: 🚨 Madrid offer €150m for Julián Álvarez, Atleti reject it
results.description: Real Madrid has submitted a formal offer of €150 million to Atlético de Madrid for Julián Álvarez, as announced this afternoon. Atlético rejected the proposal and referred the white club to the ...
